title: hydrangea hydrangeoides var. hydrangeoides
intro: Hydrangea hydrangeoides var. hydrangeoides, also known as Bigleaf Hydrangea, is a deciduous shrub native to Asia and is a member of the Hydrangeaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots and flowers, which have been used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including arthritis, fever, and rheumatism. The roots and flowers of the Bigleaf Hydrangea are rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which provide numerous health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to promote overall health and well-being, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of conditions.
